meta.population_note: Static Day-2 fixture. No truth labels or risk classifications in this file — see seeded_case_labels.json. Integrity fields (bot_similarity_score, soft_play_delta, timing_regularity) are simulated signals for P3 scoring — not real detection.
meta.archetype_distribution_note: Signal-based archetype inference: new (P-100–P-107, registered_days_ago≤14); recreational (P-110–P-141); regular (P-142–P-163); grinder (P-164–P-175); aggressive_predatory (P-176–P-183, vpip≥0.54, pfr≥0.40); promo_hunter (P-184–P-191, promo_redemptions_30d≥8, short sessions); shared_device_household (P-192–P-197, household_id set); cluster_member (P-198–P-202, cluster_id set); healthy_anchor (P-203–P-220); bot-like-seeded (P-221, extreme bot_similarity_score + timing_regularity for Eval G). NOTE: P-108 and P-109 are intentionally absent — IDs were reserved for future new-player additions and left as a deliberate gap; P3 and Bram should not expect a contiguous ID sequence.

field_glossary.vpip: voluntarily put money in pot ratio (0–1)
field_glossary.avg_pot_size_bb: average pot size in big blinds when player is involved
field_glossary.device_group_id: mocked device group — null if no shared device link; see devices.json
field_glossary.household_id: mocked household group — null if not part of a known household; see relationships.json
field_glossary.cluster_id: mocked coordination cluster — null if not in a flagged cluster; see relationships.json
field_glossary.bot_similarity_score: SIMULATED FIELD: composite score 0–1; higher = more bot-like timing/pattern regularity
field_glossary.soft_play_delta: SIMULATED FIELD: deviation from expected EV in cluster-vs-cluster hands; 0.0 = normal, negative = soft-playing (giving value away)
field_glossary.timing_regularity: SIMULATED FIELD: session/action timing consistency 0–1; higher = more regular (bot-like at extremes)
